chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3364 of 2022 ___________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ______________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 22.09-2025 Mr. Kailash Ashok Vaswani, AAG. Ihsanullah Leghari, Focal Person, College Education Department. ------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order sheet reflects that this was also the case on the previous two dates and that the matter has not been pursued over a protracted period, suggesting that the Petitioner has lost interest. The Petitions stand dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
